name: CRUD Supplier - Tambah, Edit, Search, Hapus
description: Test CRUD supplier: tambah supplier baru, cari, edit, hapus. Login admin dulu.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /login, fill email admin@inventory.com and password password, click login
Supplier page is visible with table
Fill nama with 'PT Test CRUD', telepon with '08123456789', email with 'test@supplier.com', alamat with 'Jl. Test No. 1', then click Simpan
'PT Test CRUD' appears in the suppliers table
Type 'PT Test CRUD' in the search input
Table is filtered showing only PT Test CRUD
Click the Ubah button on PT Test CRUD row
Edit modal opens with current data
Update the name to 'PT Test CRUD Updated' and click Simpan
Name updated to PT Test CRUD Updated
Click the Hapus button on PT Test CRUD Updated
PT Test CRUD Updated is removed from table
